expectations.text: Flags that TracerConf() acquires a lock per span, creating contention in setPeerService
expectations.evidence: Blocking #1 explicitly flags that 'PeerServiceMapping on TracerConf is a function closure that captures *Config and acquires c.mu.RLock() -- this is called on every span in setPeerService' and recommends using atomic.Pointer for lock-free reads instead.

expectations.text: Notes APIs introduced that have no call sites yet
expectations.evidence: The review does not flag any APIs that have no call sites. It discusses the API change to TracerConf and various methods but does not identify unused new APIs.

expectations.text: Notes that config loading should be in loadConfig, not scattered in option.go
expectations.evidence: The review does not specifically flag config loading being scattered in option.go vs loadConfig. It mentions the consolidation of schema-aware defaults into loadConfig positively (Nit #3) but does not flag any remaining scattered config loading.
